title: Foxcatcher
subTitle: Mark and David Schultz, brothers and Olympic wrestling champions, join a team called Foxcatcher, which changes their lives.

subTitle: Two thieves kidnap a wealthy family's baby for a crime boss in exchange for money. Upon developing a strong bond with the infant, they try to protect him from the latter.

title: Mona Lisa and the Blood Moon
subTitle: Mona Lisa, a woman with psychokinetic powers, escapes from a mental asylum and travels to New Orleans. Once there, she meets Bonnie who decides to make use of her powers to earn money.

title: Hotel Mumbai
subTitle: A hotel staff risks everything to keep its patrons safe during a terror attack, especially a British heiress, her husband and her infant.

title: Please Stand By
subTitle: Wendy, a young woman with autism, runs away from her caregiver and embarks on a journey of a lifetime in order to submit her manuscript to a screenwriting competition.

subTitle: And Prive HD

title: Matchless Mulan
subTitle: To protect her father from harm, a courageous girl disguises herself as a male warrior and joins the imperial army to defend her nation.

title: Crocodile Island
subTitle: The stranded passengers must fight against man-eating crocodiles after their plane makes an emergency landing on a remote island.

title: Rob-B-Hood
subTitle: Two thieves kidnap a wealthy family's baby for a crime boss in exchange for money. Upon developing a strong bond with the infant, they try to protect him from the latter.

title: Foxter & Max
subTitle: An artistic pre-teen finds a can of spray paint and uses it to create a dog out of graffiti. Subsequently, his work of art comes to life in the form of an intelligent animal made of nanobots.

title: Corner Office
subTitle: Orson is an office employee who believes his strict work ethic will help him ascend the corporate ladder. One day, he discovers an elegantly decorated room that his colleagues believe does not exist.

title: The 355
subTitle: An intelligence officer teams up with three diligent agents to recover a coveted weapon that holds the power to ignite an international conflict.

title: Beast of Burden
subTitle: Sean has one hour to deliver illegal cargo from his small plane. Meanwhile, he keeps dangerous people happy and saves his wife, all while flying and running out of time.

title: Beast of Burden
subTitle: Sean has one hour to deliver illegal cargo from his small plane. Meanwhile, he keeps dangerous people happy and saves his wife, all while flying and running out of time.

title: Midnight Special
subTitle: Roy Tomlin makes desperate efforts to protect his eight-year-old son, Alton, who possesses special powers, from a religious sect and officials of the FBI who are on a quest to capture him.

title: Nowhere to Hide
subTitle: Military-industrial thugs kill a Marine (Daniel Hugh Kelly) to keep him quiet, but his ex-Marine wife (Amy Madigan) fights back.

title: Chef vs Fridge
subTitle: Thinking outside the box is not going to cut it. These chefs must think inside the mystery refrigerator to prove their culinary skills and creativity.

title: King
subTitle: Raja and his father, who live in Hong Kong, are devastated when an accident leaves the latter on the verge of death. He decides to reunite his father with his grandfather in order to make him happy.

title: Paddington 2
subTitle: Paddington embarks on an epic quest to find a stolen pop-up book that he bought for his beloved Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday.

title: Yardie
subTitle: Dennis Campbell is hired by a criminal authority to deliver a package to a gangster in London. However, he finds out that his brother's killer dwells in the same city and decides to seek revenge.

title: China Salesman
subTitle: A young Chinese engineer, Yan Jian, competes against a French spy in a competition that awards the right to control communications technology in Africa to the winner.

title: Jurassic Attack
subTitle: Following their latest covert operation, an elite squad's return flight ends in disaster, leaving them stranded in a remote forest amongst prehistoric predators.

title: Perfect Nanny
subTitle: Myriam decides to return to work at a law firm and hires a nanny, Louise, to look after her children. However, a treacherous web of mutual dependence soon forms between Louise, Myriam and her family.

title: Corner Office
subTitle: Orson is an office employee who believes his strict work ethic will help him ascend the corporate ladder. One day, he discovers an elegantly decorated room that his colleagues believe does not exist.

title: Please Stand By
subTitle: Wendy, a young woman with autism, runs away from her caregiver and embarks on a journey of a lifetime in order to submit her manuscript to a screenwriting competition.

title: Vertigo
subTitle: Scottie Ferguson, a former police officer from San Francisco suffering from acrophobia, is hired by an old friend to investigate the peculiar behaviour of his beautiful wife, Madeleine.

title: The Marsh King's Daughter
subTitle: Helena is haunted by memories of her estranged father Jacob, who held her and her mother captive for years. However, when he escapes prison, she becomes paranoid as she prepares for his arrival.

title: Gunpowder Milkshake
subTitle: Three generations of hitwomen fight for survival against a criminal firm and try to protect what is most important to them.

subTitle: Raja and his father, who live in Hong Kong, are devastated when an accident leaves the latter on the verge of death. He decides to reunite his father with his grandfather in order to make him happy.

title: You Were Never Really Here
subTitle: An army veteran scours a brothel on a tense mission to rescue the kidnapped daughter of a New York State senator. However, things soon take a dark turn when he discovers a corrupt conspiracy.

title: Master So Dragon Subduing Palms 2
subTitle: During the Qing dynasty, two guards, Su Beg Er and Tie Qiao San, investigate the mysterious murders of two governors in Linjiang County. They join a local gang to uncover a dangerous python cult.

title: School of Life
subTitle: A biology teacher tries to win the Teacher of the Year award in order to continue the legacy of his father, who worked at the same school and won the title every year.

title: Vivarium
subTitle: Things get complicated when Tom and Gemma's search for the perfect house gets them trapped in a maze of identical houses.

title: Backstabbing for Beginners
subTitle: Michael, a young United Nations employee, is shocked when he discovers a scandalous global conspiracy involving the murder of his predecessor.

title: Mona Lisa and the Blood Moon
subTitle: Mona Lisa, a woman with psychokinetic powers, escapes from a mental asylum and travels to New Orleans. Once there, she meets Bonnie who decides to make use of her powers to earn money.

title: The Hurt Locker
subTitle: Sergeant William James is tasked with training a bomb disposal team during the Iraq War. His ideologies and reckless approach towards the job gives rise to conflicts with his subordinates.
